title: Create Quran reading application

requirements.text: Create a backend data model to store Quran surahs (chapters) with surah number, Arabic name, English transliteration, English translation, number of verses, and revelation type (Meccan/Medinan)
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores complete list of 114 surahs with metadata
Each surah includes surah number, Arabic name, transliteration, translation, verse count, and revelation type

requirements.text: Create a backend data model to store Quran verses with surah number, verse number, Arabic text, and English translation
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores verses with surah reference, verse number, Arabic text, and English translation
Verses can be queried by surah number

requirements.text: Implement backend query functions to retrieve list of all surahs and to retrieve all verses for a specific surah by surah number
acceptanceCriteria: Function returns complete list of surahs with metadata
Function accepts surah number and returns all verses for that surah
Queries return data in correct order

requirements.text: Create a home page displaying a scrollable list of all 114 surahs showing surah number, Arabic name, English name, number of verses, and revelation type
acceptanceCriteria: Home page displays complete list of all 114 surahs
Each surah entry shows number, Arabic name, English name, verse count, and revelation type
List is scrollable and organized by surah number

requirements.text: Make each surah in the list clickable to navigate to a detailed surah reading page
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a surah navigates to its reading page
Navigation preserves surah context

requirements.text: Create a surah reading page that displays the surah title, metadata, and all verses with verse numbers, Arabic text, and English translations
acceptanceCriteria: Reading page shows surah name and metadata at the top
All verses display with verse number, Arabic text, and English translation
Verses are presented in sequential order
Page is scrollable for long surahs

requirements.text: Style Arabic text appropriately with proper font rendering and right-to-left text direction support
acceptanceCriteria: Arabic text renders with appropriate font suitable for Quranic text
Text direction is right-to-left for Arabic content
Arabic text is clearly readable and properly sized

requirements.text: Design a clean, respectful visual theme with calming colors, elegant typography, and spacious layout that reflects the reverent nature of Quranic content, using warm earth tones or deep greens with cream or off-white backgrounds
acceptanceCriteria: Visual design uses respectful, calming color palette
Typography is elegant and readable
Layout provides appropriate whitespace and visual hierarchy
Overall aesthetic is clean and reverent

constraints: Must use Motoko for backend implementation
Must use React with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for frontend
Arabic text must maintain proper right-to-left rendering
